title: An Act appropriating $11,000,000 from the Transportation Trust Fund as a contribution to the General Fund of the Treasury of the Government of the Virgin
text:
ACTNO.8908
BILL NO. 35-0361
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation from the Transportation Trust Fund as a contribution to the
General Fund ofthe Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands for operating expenses
for the Virgin Islands Bureau ofMotor Vehicles and the Virgin Islands Department ofPublic
Works in the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enacted by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. Notwithstanding 33 Virgin Islands Code, section 3003a, $11,000,000 is
appropriated from the Transportation Trust Fund as a contribution to the General Fund ofthe
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through
September 30, 2025.
8008/9 TRANSPORTATION TRUST FUND FY 2025
CONTRIBUTION TO THE 0100 GENERAL FUND $11,000,000
8008/9 TOTAL TRANSPORTATION TRUST FUND S11,000,000
SECTION 2. The following sum, or so much thereof as may be necessary, is
appropriated from the amount transferred in section 1 to the Virgin Islands Bureau of Motor
Vehicles and the Virgin Islands Department ofPublic Works for operating expenses, including
wages of salaried employees of the Virgin Islands Bureau of Motor Vehicles and the Virgin
Islands Department of Public Works for the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September
30, 2025.
0100 GENERAL FUND FY 2025
360 BUREAU OF MOTOR VEHICLES
TOTAL 360 BUREAU OF MOTOR VEHICLES $1,000,000
610 DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS
TOTAL 610 DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS $5,000,000

2
0100 TOTAL GENERAL FUND $6,000,000
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this c,k._day of
September, A.D., 2024.
Novelle E. Francis,
President
Secretary
ALA A
Bill No. 35-0361 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal ofthe Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This (cSday ofOctober, 2024 A.D.
Governor
